packages.name: ONYX
packages.label: Premium Experience
packages.summary: A premium hosted gaming experience for smaller groups who want a mix of console play, racing and VR.

expanded.overview: ONYX is designed for a focused, high-energy party with a varied mix of shared gaming moments.
expanded.suited_to: Best for smaller groups who want everyone close to the action with a premium mix of experiences.
expanded.age_guidance: Suitable for groups where the games and experiences can be selected around the players.
expanded.room_guidance: Works best with enough room for displays, a racing position and safe VR movement.
additional_notes: Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

packages.addon_intro: Optional add-ons can extend or tailor the ONYX experience.
packages.enquiry_note: Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.

packages.name: JADE
packages.label: Big Party
packages.summary: A hosted big-party setup built around multiplayer gaming across multiple stations.

expanded.overview: JADE is built for larger groups, helping more players join in across multiple gaming stations.
expanded.suited_to: Best for birthdays and group events where easy rotation and shared multiplayer are priorities.
expanded.age_guidance: Game choices can be guided by the group and the style of party you want.
expanded.room_guidance: Works best in a clear room with space for multiple stations, displays and guest movement.
additional_notes: Optional add-ons can be discussed during enquiry.

packages.addon_intro: Optional add-ons can extend or tailor the JADE experience.
packages.enquiry_note: Tell us about your room and group and we’ll confirm the best setup.
